sentences.text: If the Ssstrict extension is implemented, then no non-conforming extensions are present.
sentences.section: Preamble > Ssstrict Extension for Extension Conformance, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Furthermore, attempts to execute unimplemented opcodes or access unimplemented CSRs in the standard or reserved encoding spaces raises an illegal instruction exception that results in a contained trap to the supervisor-mode trap handler.
sentences.section: Preamble > Ssstrict Extension for Extension Conformance, Version 1.0
